verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord we come to you in worship No matter what the circumstances No matter what the situation As we lift up your holy name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: El Elah Elohim How we long to worship you El Elah Elohim How we long to worship you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord we come to you in praise No matter what may have as bound For we know you'll set us free If we lift up our hands and say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How we long to worship you
